# Magnus Froste - Portfolio & Expertise

> Innovation Strategist and Agentic AI expert. Portfolio, blog, GitHub projects, and an agentic MCP server exposing skills + project data to AI assistants.

## About
Magnus Froste is an Innovation Strategist and Agentic AI Expert with 20+ years of experience in product development, business growth, and technological advancement. He helps companies leverage cutting-edge technology to drive innovation and sustainable growth.

## Services
- Innovation Strategy Consulting
- AI Integration & Implementation
- Product Development Advisory
- Startup Acceleration & Mentoring
- Digital Transformation

## Expertise Areas
- Agentic AI and Large Language Models
- Product Strategy & Development
- Business Model Innovation
- Technology Roadmapping
- Team Leadership & Scaling

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.froste.eu/): Overview, hero, expertise grid
- [Blog](https://www.froste.eu/blog): Articles on AI, innovation, technology
- [GitHub Projects](https://www.froste.eu/github): Synced repos with enriched problem statements and case studies

## Agentic Access (MCP)
This site exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and OpenClaw discover and use:
- `list_projects` — browse Magnus's GitHub projects with filters
- `get_project` — full enriched data for a specific project (problem, why-it-matters, README, images)
- `search_projects` — full-text search across all projects
- All dynamically registered agent skills

MCP endpoint: `https://jcsjqnjvnqqghiaawhcl.supabase.co/functions/v1/mcp-server`
Resources: `project://<repo-name>` per synced GitHub repo
Auth: Bearer MCP key (request via contact)

## Contact
- Website: https://www.froste.eu
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/magnusfroste
- Chat: AI-powered assistant on the website
